strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend APIs to UI and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest experience beyond junior/mid-level, raising fit concerns for entry-level role
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services listed as preferred in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep, diverse fullstack expertise with TypeScript and modern web technologies, alongside strong architectural and DevOps practices, but his senior-level titles and lack of German proficiency may hinder alignment with the junior-focused, on-site role in Berlin.
